title: UCI Read/Write from ucode
description: Concrete guide to reading and writing UCI configuration from a ucode script or rpcd plugin, covering cursor lifecycle, get/set/commit, section iteration, and error handling.
when_to_use: Use when writing a ucode script or rpcd plugin that needs to read or write OpenWrt configuration. UCI is the correct storage mechanism for persistent, user-editable config on OpenWrt -- do not read /etc/config files directly or write config with shell heredocs.
verification_basis: Corpus review of ucode/c_source-api-module-uci.md; cursor() API verified from ucode module docs; uci.get/set/commit signatures confirmed; luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-root-usr-share-rpcd-ucode-example-uc.md for real-world cursor pattern
